title: Hiring Software Engineer at 1mg Capital India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at 1mg Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the 1mg Capital India family as a Software Engineer in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 1mg Capital India:
1mg Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg Capital India!
